name: Uptics

auth.notes: Bearer token in the Authorization header; API key is managed under Settings > Integrations > API Page.

rateLimits: No HTTP rate limit found; official docs state each lookup request consumes 1 Uptics credit.
pagination: No pagination documented for the published lookup POST endpoints.
